<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get job details"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/jobs/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve detailed information about a specific job

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Job ID","in":"path","name":"id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"execution_logs":{"description":"ExecutionLogs contains log entries for this job (future enhancement)","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"retry_history":{"description":"RetryHistory shows previous retry attempts","items":{"properties":{"attempt":{"description":"Attempt is the attempt number (1-indexed)","type":"integer"},"error":{"description":"Error is the error message from this attempt","type":"string"},"timestamp":{"description":"Timestamp is when this attempt occurred","type":"string"}},"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"source_name":{"description":"SourceName is the name of the source (if applicable)","type":"string"},"task":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"attempts":{"description":"Attempts is how many times this task has been attempted","type":"integer"},"completed_at":{"description":"CompletedAt is when processing finished (nil if not complete)","type":"string"},"created_at":{"description":"CreatedAt is when the task was enqueued","type":"string"},"error":{"description":"Error contains the last error message if failed","type":"string"},"id":{"description":"ID is the unique identifier for this task","type":"string"},"max_attempts":{"description":"MaxAttempts is the maximum retry count before giving up","type":"integer"},"payload":{"additionalProperties":{"type":"string"},"description":"Payload contains task-specific data\nFor sync_source: {\"source_id\": \"src-123\"}\nFor sync_all: {} (empty)","type":"object"},"priority":{"description":"Priority determines processing order (higher = more urgent)\nDefault is 0, range is -100 to 100","type":"integer"},"scheduled_for":{"description":"ScheduledFor is when the task should be processed (for delayed tasks)","type":"string"},"started_at":{"description":"StartedAt is when processing began (nil if not started)","type":"string"},"status":{"allOf":[{"enum":["pending","processing","completed","failed"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["TaskStatusPending","TaskStatusProcessing","TaskStatusCompleted","TaskStatusFailed"]}],"description":"Status is the current state of the task"},"team_id":{"description":"TeamID is the team this task belongs to","type":"string"},"type":{"allOf":[{"enum":["sync_source","sync_all"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["TaskTypeSyncSource","TaskTypeSyncAll"]}],"description":"Type identifies what kind of task this is"},"updated_at":{"description":"UpdatedAt is when the task was last modified","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"Task is the main task information"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Missing job ID","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"404":{"description":"Job not found","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
